ctxMarket: Attention is on institutional adoption and new primitives in the Solana ecosystem. Recent headlines highlight major banks engaging with crypto lending and ongoing growth in tokenized assets and stablecoins.
ctxTalking:
• Morgan Stanley’s partnership with Galaxy Digital enables clients to lend Solana, Bitcoin, and Ethereum for ETP shares.
• Solana ecosystem reports record highs in tokenized real-world assets and ETF inflows.
• Native onchain subscriptions and allowances are now live on Solana.
ctxMatters: Institutional players are expanding their crypto offerings to include Solana, signaling increased mainstream engagement. The rise in tokenized assets and stablecoin supply points to Solana’s growing role in digital finance infrastructure. New payment primitives could drive more consumer and developer activity on the network.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Institutional lending products now include Solana; onchain recurring payments are live.
Noise: Speculation about the long-term impact of ETF inflows without supporting data.
ctxGlossary:
ETP — Exchange-traded product, a security that tracks an underlying asset and trades on exchanges.
RWA — Real-world asset, physical or traditional financial assets represented onchain.

readMore.title: Morgan Stanley’s Galaxy deal points to Bitcoin’s next institutional test
